untranslatable_reason: Signal requires tick-level data (cumulative tick imbalance b_t, tick persistence direction, volume-weighted directional bias across consecutive bars) which are not available in the allowed indicator set. The allowed indicators operate at bar/candle level only and do not include intra-bar tick imbalance metrics needed to detect informed trader arrival patterns as described in the source text.
translation_notes: Attempted proxy using volume ratio and historical volatility as surrogate measures for elevated market activity/imbalance, but this does NOT capture the core tick imbalance signal detection mechanism required by the rule. A proper implementation would need tick-by-tick order flow imbalance calculation.
